---
title: "Contribution Yannick"
format: pdf
---

## Yannick — Contribution Statement

**Primarily responsible for:** data cleaning (initial pipeline version), initial data analysis (IDA), project reproducibility (`renv.lock`), and README/Quarto output configuration.

- **Repository Configuration**: Configured the Quarto output options in the proposal YAML header to automatically compile directly to `index.html` to support deployment on GitHub Pages.
- **Sourcing & Cleaning**: Sourced the Munich traffic accidents dataset, documented the dataset licensing (`data/raw/LICENCE.md`), and wrote the initial version of the data cleaning script that established the data-filtering logic (dropping 'Summe' rows and selecting variables).
- **Initial Data Analysis & Plan**: Wrote the initial IDA section in the proposal (Section 2, including the dataset shape, missing-value diagnostic counts, and data-quality warnings) and authored the structured Analysis Plan.
- **Environment & Reproducibility**: Implemented project package management using `renv` to pin package versions, refactored the analytical scripts to execute cleanly from the project root, and documented execution steps in `README.md`.

**Collaborative tasks:** workflow organisation, merging and consolidation of the proposal document (`project-proposal.qmd`), final report compilation, and formatting.
